name: swift-agent-kit
description: Swift development kit for agentic coding: avoids common Swift pitfalls (house Swift 6/SwiftUI standards), provides all Apple documentation (SDK grep, DocC, HIG, WWDC, Swift Evolution + DocumentationSearch routing), installs Apple's Xcode 27 skills by extracting them from your local Xcode (their license doesn't permit redistribution), drives Xcode as a build/run/debug worker over MCP, and embeds instruments-analyzer for programmatic Instruments-trace analysis.
license: MIT (original content; extracted Apple content remains Apple's — see README)
